technician_note: Cust states infotainment screen goes black and reboots randomly while driving. Verified concern - display rebooted twice during 20 min road test. No DTCs stored. Reseated harness connectors. Escalated to tech line, awaiting guidance.
Front brakes squealing. Pads worn to 2mm, rotors scored. R&R front pads and rotors. Cust declined rear at this time. Wear item - not warranty.
A/C not blowing cold. Recovered refrigerant - system low. Found leak at condenser. Replaced condenser under warranty, recharged, op check good, vents 42F.
cust: power sliding door pass side wont close, beeps and reverses. found obstruction sensor faulty. ordered sensor/harness. parts BO.
check engine light. P0420 catalyst eff below threshold bank 1. cleared, road tested, returned. advised monitor.
bluetooth keeps disconnecting and screen froze once. reprogrammed audio unit per TSB. seems ok now
oil leak lower engine. valve cover gasket seeping. quoted customer, declined repair today.
customer reports vehicle hesitates/stumbles on accel then CEL flashes. Could not duplicate. NFF. advised return if reoccurs.
TPMS light on. LF sensor not reading. replaced tpms sensor, relearned all 4.
infotainment reboot AGAIN, 3rd visit for same. cust frustrated. installed updated software and reflashed audio/nav. QA drive no fault observed.
AC compressor noisy, clutch not engaging. compressor failed internally. out of warranty - cust approved est. R&R compressor, evac/recharge.
steering feels loose w/ slight clunk over bumps. found lower control arm bushing worn. warranty replaced LCA, performed alignment.
battery dead again, cust jump started twice this week. tested battery weak + parasitic draw ~120mA over spec. suspect aftermarket dashcam hardwired to fuse box. advised cust.
rattle from dash area on rough roads. located loose trim clip behind glove box. secured, NFF otherwise.
sliding door pass side intermittent - sometimes stops halfway. lubed track and adjusted. will monitor, possible motor.
screen went black on customer delivery drive, cust very upset new vehicle. rebooted on its own. no dtc. per district reps collecting data on CR-V audio units.
trans shudders on light throttle 40-50 mph. verified. torque converter shudder. per TSB flush and replace ATF w/ updated fluid. improved on retest.
A/C weak cooling. dye test found evap core leak. warranty - replaced evaporator, recharged. cold now.
cust states car pulls right. uneven tire wear RF. alignment out of spec, adjusted. recommend tires soon.
warning - 'collision system unavailable' intermittent. cleaned front radar sensor area, no obstruction found. reflashed ADAS module. op check ok.
no start intermittent, cranks no start when hot. tested low fuel pressure. replaced fuel pump assembly. OOW cust pay.
power sliding door driver side wont open w/ button, manual works. replaced door control motor under warranty.
CEL P0301 misfire cyl 1. found failed ignition coil #1. replaced coil and spark plug. warranty.
cust concerned about whining/whir noise during regen braking. explained normal hybrid operation. NFF, no repair needed.
AC not cold blows warm. system empty. leak at low side line fitting o-ring. replaced o-ring, recharged. OOW - cust pay.
screen reboots + backup camera failed to display once when in reverse. safety concern noted. reflashed audio/nav unit, updated sw. monitoring.
rodent damage - chewed wiring harness engine bay, multiple codes present. NOT warranty (external cause). quoted harness repair, cust filing insurance.
cust: humming noise rear, louder with speed. road test - rear wheel bearing LH noisy. replaced hub bearing assy under warranty.
intermittent no-crank, single click. starter and battery test ok. found loose ground cable at engine block, cleaned and torqued. could not duplicate after. NFF / repaired?
AC blows warm intermittently then cold. suspect compressor clutch cycling. could not duplicate today, cold at counter. told cust return when acting up. NFF.
